message:
test(server): add 5 end-to-end alien enhancement integration tests (br-hl5tk, J.1)

1. alien_e2e_cache_evidence_flow: S3-FIFO eviction + evidence ledger recording
2. alien_e2e_coalesce_sharded_evidence: sharded coalesce + evidence ledger
3. alien_e2e_bocpd_conformal_tui: BOCPD change-point + conformal interval widening
4. alien_e2e_bayesian_layout_integration: strategy convergence + determinism
5. alien_e2e_transparency_full_drill: L0-L3 drill-down rendering

All tracks (A-I + H) validated working together in integrated scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
